gauge.name: Cass River at Frankenmuth

impacts.statement: Water will likely begin making its way around the levee and into downtown Frankenmuth.
Softball fields and picnic areas by Bavarian Inn Resort will be under about 3 feet of water.
At least three houses, by Dixie Highway and Knott Road in Bridgeport Township, become surrounded by water. Water flows on both sides of the Cass River bridge on Dixie Highway.
Water floods driveways of several houses on Curtis Road near Frankenmuth.
Water reaches Curtis Road and Dixie Highway by Green Acres Golf Course between Bridgeport and Frankenmuth. Widespread flooding of adjacent lowlands and agricutlural lands worsens.
The recreation park by the Bavarian Inn Resort in Frankenmuth floods.
Some backyards on Curtis Road near Frankenmuth flood.
Flooding begins on Green Acres Golf Course located on the Bridgeport and Frankenmuth Township border.
The river begins to overflow its banks in places, flooding adjacent low lands.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
dataAttribution.title: US Geological Survey

Observations courtesy of U.S. Army Corps of Engineers

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
